name: AI Uber Eats Experience
description: Complete Uber Eats food ordering experience with voice ordering, menu management, and shopping cart functionality
author: Amazon Nova Team
features: Voice AI ordering with Nova Sonic

preview.description: Experience the future of Uber Eats ordering with AI-powered voice interactions, real-time menu updates, and seamless cart management.

setupInstructions: Configure your Amazon Cognito User Pool and Identity Pool
Set up API Gateway endpoints for menu and cart operations
Ensure Amazon Bedrock Nova Sonic access in your region
Test voice permissions in your browser
